function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Real](-(g(i, j) - lg))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(neg_g, neg_lg, eps2)

function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real, x4: Real, x5: Real) { not x0.is_close(x1, x2) or not x3.is_close(x4, x5) or (x0 + x3).is_close(x1 + x4, x2 + x5) }(f(i, j), lf, eps2, neg_g, neg_lg, eps2)

goal: (f(i, j) - g(i, j)).is_close(lf - lg, eps2 + eps2)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not x0 < x1 or not x2.is_close(x3, x0) or x2.is_close(x3, x1) }(eps2 + eps2, eps, f(i, j) - g(i, j), lf - lg)

function(x0: Nat, x1: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and x0 <= k1 and not x1(k0, k1).is_close(x2, x3) } or double_limit_condition(x1, x2, x0, x3) }(n, sub_fn_2(f, g), diff_limit, eps)

function(x0: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x1: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Nat) { not double_limit_condition(x0, x1, x2, k0) } } or double_converges_to(x0, x1) }(sub_fn_2(f, g), diff_limit)
